title.name: Water Resources. Flood and Erosion Control

sections.heading: Secs. 25-122 to 25-125. Authority to enter compact. Assistance to Governor. Connecticut Interstate Water Compact Commission. Appropriation.

body: Secs. 25-122 to 25-125. Authority to enter compact. Assistance to Governor. Connecticut Interstate Water Compact Commission. Appropriation. Sections 25-122 to 25-125 , inclusive, are repealed.
